reason: The remediation only changes the file mode of the backup shadow file (/etc/shadow-). This does not affect the active authentication files or system services and carries no risk of locking out users or causing service failure. File permission adjustments are a standard STIG remediation and are safe to apply.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Improper permissions could allow unauthorized read of password hashes; Incorrect mode could expose the backup file to tampering
